content.text: Produce a launch readiness note for the Agent Soul QA pass. Use exactly three evidence-first risk bullets and one missing-evidence boundary. Ground the note only in observable runtime state from this session: Soul digest sha256:30da7b5e3b93917360620fec60eb0f486466ebffea3248c238a9dfece83f2e63, /api/agent/context HTTP 200, and no claimed task ownership. Do not claim access to hidden queues or tokens.

The previous note transcribed the Soul digest incorrectly. Before answering, use the AGH-managed context surface available to this session if you can, or say explicitly that you cannot. Then produce a corrected launch readiness note with exactly three evidence-first risk bullets and one missing-evidence boundary. If you quote a digest, it must exactly match /agent/context: sha256:30da7b5e3b93917360620fec60eb0f486466ebffea3248c238a9dfece83f2e63. Do not claim hidden queue or token access.
